title: Feet thank me
review_text: I put these on after every run now. The arch support and thick cushion make my feet feel instantly better. Best recovery purchase I've made.

title: Size down
review_text: Love the cushion but I'm usually a 10 and the 10 was too big. Exchanged for 9 and it's perfect. Size down if between sizes.

title: Plantar fasciitis relief
review_text: Bought these specifically for plantar fasciitis. The arch support is better than most slides I've tried. Wear them around the house all day.
